Localization.Description: A user performed an action with file change information

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} pushed changes of file "{object.name}" to the server
User {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} is denied pushing changes of file "{object.name}" to the server
User {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} was able to request changes of file "{object.name}" from the server
User {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} is denied getting changes of file "{object.name}" from the server
